name: Mai Tran
title: Accounting & Finance Student
bio: I am an Accounting student transitioning from Quincy College to Northeastern University in Spring 2027. Moving from small business operations and pharmacy roles into finance, I combine a passion for details and accuracy with strong customer service skills.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Accounting & Finance

highlights: Relevant coursework: Accounting, Finance, Business Law, Federal Taxation

experience.title: Pharmacist Technician
highlights: Input prescription details carefully to ensure accurate data entry and prevent patient confidentiality errors
Navigate healthcare billing systems to fix complex insurance issues and clarify costs for 25+ customers daily
Follow strict pharmacy regulations to maintain high compliance and keep shift error rates below 1%

experience.title: Bookkeeper

Calculate tips, commissions, and vendor bills to run error-free payroll on time for 15+ workers
Track daily store numbers and answer pay questions to fix budget errors and stop staff disputes

experience.title: Bookkeeper
